en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: mhtu wagi la, kilux ci kayan nya.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?
B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ini, nyu sbehuy la, sbehuy ci.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?

ab: ini skinut ru ini kilux soni, ble ci.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.
A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: ungat yulung nya babaw kayan, nyu mhtu bengah la.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?

ab: mswat walax nya micu, mhtu wagi lga, mhtu hongu lutux uyi la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: maha kenu kayan nya beh kya?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?
B: We're going to have a big storm here.
A: How's the weather there?
B: Very well, out of the big sun.
A: I have to go to school.

ab: skinut ci kayan nya, piyux cmi lukus.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I'm going out.

ab: mosa hopa walax nya kisa, aras ci ruku.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你一定要帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you must bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: waya cmu bicyu soni ci, ini ba’iy mosa mwalax kisa.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下可能就要下雨。
en: B: It just thundered, and it might rain later.
A: Is it raining?

ab: waya mwalax soni ci, nyu mswat micu la.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: yani hayi waya mwalax la, nyu mhoyi tu’iy.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: waya mwalax? ca nyu mhoyi kwara he su?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: cyu mwalax tanux, ini cu aras ruku.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: Are you all right?

ab: hopa ci behuy nya, memaw ga’ing tunux mu sbehuy.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
A: Are you all right?

ab: hopa ci wagi nya, memaw kging tunux mu bun wagi.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
